1.0.0.description: Low-level buffer and bit-manipulation toolkit. Provides auto-growing buffer read/write for u8/u16/u32/i8/i16/i32/f32/f64, VLQ encode/decode, dispatch tables, range and VLQ codec factories, fixed-string codecs, arithmetic/memory/bits sub-modules (popcount, parity, sign-extend, bounds checks, power-of-two helpers), orderedHash, memoize, id allocator, metadata store, template cloner, and aliasStdlib.
